inputs.label: Initial Deposit
inputs.businessContext: The starting balance of the savings account.

inputs.label: Monthly Contribution
inputs.businessContext: The amount deposited at the end of each month.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate (APY)
inputs.businessContext: The annual percentage yield, representing the effective annual rate of return taking compounding into account.

inputs.label: Investment Period
inputs.businessContext: The total number of years the money is invested.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Number of times interest is compounded per year. Typically 12 for monthly, 4 for quarterly, 1 for annually.

formulas.futureValue: monthlyRate === 0 ? (initialDeposit + monthlyContribution * totalPeriods) : (initialDeposit * Math.pow(1 + monthlyRate, totalPeriods) + monthlyContribution * ((Math.pow(1 + monthlyRate, totalPeriods) - 1) / monthlyRate))
